popularStory.headline: A Little Bit About the Clan
popularStory.description: In Scottish Gaelic, the old language of our people, "Mac" means "Son of." We of Clan Gregor, are the Sons of Gregor, the Followers of Gregor, and better known as the MacGregors. The name McGregor is …

zh.lifeSummary: 當(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson於1353年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，他的父親Lord Malcolm MacGregor57歲，母親Mary McAlpine of Finnick73歲。他於1400年與Janet Glendening在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1425年4月9日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson于1353年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯时，他的父亲Lord Malcolm MacGregor57岁，母亲Mary McAlpine of Finnick73岁。他于1400年与Janet Glendening在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1425年4月9日在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: Grierson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Kirkcudbrightshire): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier , a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ), + son. Compare Greer , with which some variation is evident among the early bearers, and compare Gregor and McGregor .

History: A Scottish family by the name of Grierson claim descent from Gilbert, a son of Malcolm MacGregor (died 1374), 11th Lord of MacGregor. Gilbert was known as both MacGregor and Gregorson. In 1400 he was granted lands by the Earl of March in the name Grierson. The numerous northern Irish bearers of the name Greer claim descent from this same Gilbert.

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson was born in 1353, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Malcolm MacGregor, was 57 and his mother, Mary McAlpine of Finnick, was 73. He married Janet Glendening in 1400, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 9 April 1425, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson est né en 1353, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Malcolm MacGregor, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Mary McAlpine of Finnick, avait 73 ans. Il a épousé Janet Glendening en 1400, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 9 avril 1425, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson 1353 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Malcolm MacGregor 57 und seine Mutter Mary McAlpine of Finnick 73. Er hat 1400 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Janet Glendening geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 9. April 1425 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Janet Glendening nel 1400, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 9 aprile 1425, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.Old Dunscore Cemetery Dunscore, Dumfries: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 던스코어
ko.lifeSummary: (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson(이)가 1353년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Malcolm MacGregor(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary McAlpine of Finnick(은)는 73세였다. 그는 1400년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Janet Glendening(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1425년 4월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 던스코어에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Janet Glendening em 1400, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.Old Dunscore Cemetery Dunscore, Dumfries: дунскор, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson родился в 1353 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Malcolm MacGregor было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary McAlpine of Finnick, 73. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Glendening в 1400 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 9 апреля 1425 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности дунскор, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.
